body_txt: Some things are so commonly studded with jewels that it's almost expected, like crowns, tiaras, and scepters , but these days some people will stick jewels on loads of things. Just look up "bling" on an image search. On clothing, this easily makes Costume Porn . A Pimped-Out Dress is likely to have jewels sewn into the fabric. Tiaras and Imperial crowns even more. Some instances of Crystal Skull are depicted as skulls with gems on them instead of being solid crystal. This can include real gems or even plastic gems, which are often seen in girls' toys. Done with real diamonds, this is called Icing Out. Compare Built with LEGO , Gold Makes Everything Shiny , Made O' Gold , Power Crystal , Symbol Motif Clothing . See Bling-Bling-BANG! for when this gets applied to firearms. Not to be confused with the game Bejeweled .
